build.buildCommand: pip install torch --index-url https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cpu && pip install -r requirements.txt && python manage.py collectstatic --noinput

deploy.startCommand: python manage.py migrate --noinput && python manage.py ensure_superuser && python manage.py setup_google_oauth && python manage.py check_google_oauth && gunicorn chamdiemtudong.wsgi --bind 0.0.0.0:$PORT --workers 2 --timeout 120
